DFFlagBatchedInstancePush.mechanism: Optimizes how multiple instances are processed and sent to the client.
DFFlagBatchedInstancePush.purpose: Reduces lag and improves game performance for players.

FFlagFixFlakyMusicTests.mechanism: Improves the reliability of music playback tests in the system.
FFlagFixFlakyMusicTests.purpose: Ensures that music features work consistently without unexpected failures.

FFlagUpdateDiscoveryEventErrorDetailsLog.mechanism: Enhances logging for errors related to discovery events.
FFlagUpdateDiscoveryEventErrorDetailsLog.purpose: Helps developers identify and fix issues faster, leading to a smoother experience for players.

FFlagUpdateDescriptorByNameForDescV2_Sta.mechanism: Updates how item descriptors are retrieved by name in a new version.
FFlagUpdateDescriptorByNameForDescV2_Sta.purpose: Provides players with more accurate and efficient item searches.

DFFlagReducedPseudoTraceFromAttributes.mechanism: Reduces unnecessary tracking data from attributes in the system.
DFFlagReducedPseudoTraceFromAttributes.purpose: Improves performance and reduces lag for players during gameplay.

FIntRelocateMobileMenuButtonsVariant_IXP.mechanism: Changes the layout of mobile menu buttons for better accessibility.
FIntRelocateMobileMenuButtonsVariant_IXP.purpose: Makes it easier for mobile players to navigate and use the menu.

FFlagTraversalHistoryDiscoveryTelemetry.mechanism: Tracks player navigation paths to improve user experience.
FFlagTraversalHistoryDiscoveryTelemetry.purpose: Helps Roblox understand how players move through the platform, leading to better game recommendations.

FFlagProfilePlatformEnableLazyLoadingCom.mechanism: Loads profile elements only when needed to save resources.
FFlagProfilePlatformEnableLazyLoadingCom.purpose: Makes player profiles load faster and more efficiently, enhancing overall user experience.
